title: Puntato's Vanilla+
description: A 16x vanilla-esque resource pack redoing the game's textures in a different style.
body:
A resource pack redoing the game in my style while keeping mostly to the spirit of vanilla :)

The original promise of weekly updates collapsed, I'm just releasing content when I can!

If you'd like to see the pack in action, it's used by youtuber EddieHR in some of his series (huge thanks to him for the publicity!)

Full credit to vanilla tweaks for the low fire, they are lovely people for letting me use those textures until I redo fire myself

---

Thank you so much for 1000 downloads! It makes me really very happy to see my art reaching that many people :)
As of this milestone, I have decided to open a discord server for my pack; if you have any feedback, I'm eager to hear it!

[Join here!](https://discord.gg/9JSzhWYF8v)
